productDisplayName: ADIDAS Men Orange F10 Sports Shoes
description: Style NoteThe adidas F10 TRX FG is a part of the Adizero line and is patterned after the Adidas F50. The upper is a roughly 266 grams which is pretty light for soccer cleats. A high performance boot, this shoe is designed with a shiny, eye-catching upper that makes it stylish as well as functional. (We recommend that you break into these shoes by jogging or running for about 20 minutes!)Product DetailsShiny synthetic upper with Adidas Traxion chassisAsymetrical lacing system and lightly padded collar and tongueAgion anti-microbial treated lining to prevent bacteriaDie-cut EVA insole Plastic outsole with Traxion FG studsMaterial and CareSyntheticWipe with clean dry cloth to remove dustDo not machine wash
